etymology.description: 蠔(蠔) (háo, "oyster") + 油(油) (yóu, "oil; sauce") = a sauce derived from oysters
etymology.interpretation: 蠔(蠔) (háo, "oyster") directly denotes the primary ingredient, clarifying the protein source of the sauce. 油(油) (yóu, "oil; sauce") implies the liquid, seasoned, and often glossy texture typical of oils or concentrated sauces. Together, the terms convey the essential product: a thick, flavorful cooking condiment extracted from oysters.

examples.chinese: 我喜欢用蚝油(我喜歡用蠔油)做饭。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ xǐhuan yòng háoyóu zuò fàn.
examples.english: I like to use oyster sauce for cooking.

examples.chinese: 这道菜加了蚝油(這道菜加了蠔油)，味道更鲜美(味道更鮮美)。
examples.pinyin: Zhè dào cài jiāle háoyóu, wèidào gèng xiānměi.
examples.english: This dish has added oyster sauce and tastes more delicious.

examples.chinese: 蚝油可以提升菜肴的味道(蠔油可以提升菜餚的味道)。
examples.pinyin: Háoyóu kěyǐ tíshēng càiyáo de wèidào.
examples.english: Oyster sauce can enhance the flavor of the dishes.
